The latest announcement is out from Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited ( (GCDT) ).

Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited reported that its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Lai Tai Yan, resigned effective April 15, 2026, with the company stating there were no known disagreements with him regarding its operations, policies or practices. The board has begun searching for a new CFO, and the leadership transition places short-term attention on Green Circle’s financial management and governance stability at a time when execution and investor confidence are critical in the competitive decarbonization technology market.

More about Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited

Green Circle Decarbonize Technology Limited is a Cayman Islands holding company listed on the NYSE under the ticker GCDT and headquartered in Hong Kong. The company operates in the decarbonization technology space, focusing on solutions that support emissions reduction and the broader energy transition, positioning it within the rapidly evolving global clean-technology sector.

data.title: Exelon Backs Affordability, Withdraws PECO Rate Review Petitions
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Exelon ( (EXC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 16, 2026, PECO, Exelon’s Pennsylvania utility subsidiary, withdrew its recently filed electric and natural gas distribution rate review petitions with the state regulator, citing severe cost-of-living pressures on households and businesses and emphasizing customer affordability. The move pauses near- and long-term grid modernization rate requests while PECO continues essential safety and reliability investments, reassesses the timing of larger capital projects, and works with state officials and stakeholders on longer-term solutions to high energy costs.

In response to these developments and broader regulatory changes, including the pending Maryland Utility RELIEF Act passed on April 13, 2026, Exelon plans to redeploy and delay certain capital projects and pursue operational efficiencies without altering its earnings outlook. The company reaffirmed its 2026 adjusted operating earnings guidance of $2.81–$2.91 per share and its expectation that adjusted operating earnings growth from 2025 to 2029 will be near the top of its 5%–7% annualized range, signaling confidence that it can manage regulatory shifts while maintaining financial targets.

The most recent analyst rating on (EXC) stock is a Buy with a $52.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Exelon stock, see the EXC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EXC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EXC is a Neutral.

EXC scores as a moderately attractive utility: positive guidance and a credible multi-year regulated growth/capex plan support the outlook, and technicals show favorable momentum. The main constraint is financial flexibility—elevated leverage and consistently negative free cash flow—while valuation is fair with a supportive dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on EXC stock, click here.

More about Exelon

Exelon Corporation is a Fortune 200 company and one of the largest regulated utility providers in the United States, delivering electricity and natural gas through six transmission and distribution subsidiaries to nearly 11 million customers. Its PECO unit, founded in 1881 and headquartered in Philadelphia, is Pennsylvania’s largest electric and natural gas delivery company, serving about 1.7 million electric and over 556,000 gas customers in southeastern Pennsylvania.

Average Trading Volume: 8,809,801

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $48.98B

For a thorough assessment of EXC stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Star Group Extends Streak With Higher Quarterly Distribution
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Star Gas Partners ( (SGU) ).

On April 16, 2026, Star Group, L.P. announced it had raised its quarterly distribution for the fiscal second quarter ended March 31, 2026 to $0.1975 per common unit from $0.1850, lifting the annual payout by $0.05 to $0.79 per unit. The move, which preserves a 14-year streak of consecutive annual dividend increases, underscores management’s confidence in the business and enhances the partnership’s appeal to yield-oriented unitholders.

The distribution will be paid on May 6, 2026 to unitholders of record as of April 27, 2026, reinforcing a stable cash-return profile in a sector often exposed to commodity and weather volatility. By continuing to raise its payout, Star signals resilient cash generation from its home heating and energy services operations despite broader macro and energy market uncertainties.

Spark’s Take on SGU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SGU is a Neutral.

SGU scores as a solid, value-leaning setup: the biggest positives are attractive valuation (low P/E and high yield) and improving operating/cash performance, supported by a constructive technical trend. The main constraints are mid-tier financial strength due to thin margins and only moderate cash-flow coverage versus debt, plus earnings-call headwinds from higher costs and weaker service profitability.

To see Spark’s full report on SGU stock, click here.

More about Star Gas Partners

Star Group, L.P. is a full-service home energy distributor and services provider focused on residential and commercial customers in the Northeast and Mid-Atlantic U.S. regions. The company sells home heating oil, propane, diesel and gasoline, and installs and services heating and air conditioning equipment, and it believes it is the nation’s largest retail distributor of home heating oil by sales volume.

The group also offers delivery-only fuel services while extending HVAC offerings primarily to its home heating oil and propane base, with some outreach beyond that core. Its market position in home heating fuels and related services makes its distribution policy an important signal for income-focused investors and stakeholders.

On April 16, 2026, Star Group, L.P. announced it had raised its quarterly distribution for the fiscal second quarter ended March 31, 2026 to $0.1975 per common unit from $0.1850, lifting the annual payout by $0.05 to $0.79 per unit. The move, which preserves a 14-year streak of consecutive annual dividend increases, underscores management’s confidence in the business and enhances the partnership’s appeal to yield-oriented unitholders.

The distribution will be paid on May 6, 2026 to unitholders of record as of April 27, 2026, reinforcing a stable cash-return profile in a sector often exposed to commodity and weather volatility. By continuing to raise its payout, Star signals resilient cash generation from its home heating and energy services operations despite broader macro and energy market uncertainties.

data.title: Bright Mountain Media Stock Downgraded to OTCID Tier
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Bright Mountain Media ( (BMTM) ).

Bright Mountain Media, Inc. disclosed that its common stock failed to meet the OTCQB Standards for Continued Eligibility after its bid price remained below $0.01 for more than 30 consecutive calendar days. The company had until April 9, 2026, to regain compliance by achieving a minimum closing bid price of at least $0.01 for ten consecutive trading days but did not do so by that deadline.

As a result, effective April 10, 2026, Bright Mountain Media’s common stock was downgraded from the OTCQB market tier and began trading on the OTCID tier of the OTC Markets Group under the same ticker, BMTM. This move reflects a deterioration in the company’s market valuation and may affect investor perception and liquidity for shareholders, given the lower status associated with the OTCID tier.

Spark’s Take on BMTM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BMTM is a Underperform.

The score is held down primarily by a highly stressed balance sheet (deeply negative equity and heavy leverage) and negative corporate developments (loan deferrals/PIK interest, equity issued to lenders, and an expected move to OTC Pink). Partial offsets include long-term revenue scaling and a return to positive operating/free cash flow in 2025, though profitability remains negative and cash generation is not yet strong or consistent.

To see Spark’s full report on BMTM stock, click here.

More about Bright Mountain Media

Bright Mountain Media, Inc. is a publicly traded company listed on the OTC Markets Group under the symbol BMTM. The company operates within the broader media and digital advertising space, with its common stock historically traded on the OTCQB market tier before its recent reclassification to a lower tier due to share price performance.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $760.3K

Learn more about BMTM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

General Mills ( (GIS) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 9, 2026, General Mills agreed to sell €1.0 billion of 4.750% Series A fixed-to-fixed reset rate junior subordinated notes and €700 million of 5.250% Series B fixed-to-fixed reset rate junior subordinated notes, both maturing in 2056, to a syndicate of underwriters led by major global banks. The notes, issued under an existing 1996 indenture and registered under a shelf registration statement, are expected to close on April 16, 2026, providing the company with long-term subordinated financing that could support its capital structure and funding flexibility.

The transaction involves filing key deal documents, including the underwriting agreement, officers’ certificates, and related legal and tax opinions, with the Securities and Exchange Commission. By using junior subordinated notes with fixed-to-fixed reset features and long-dated maturities, General Mills is tapping euro debt markets in a way that may optimize its cost of capital while preserving flexibility for future refinancing or balance sheet management.

data.title: Nouveau Monde Graphite Raises US$96.5 Million to Advance Phase-2 Matawinie Mine
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nouveau Monde Mining ( (TSE:NOU) ) has issued an update.

On April 16, 2026, Nouveau Monde Graphite closed a US$96.5 million bought deal equity public offering of 52,440,000 subscription receipts at US$1.84 each to help finance the phased commercial development of its Phase-2 Matawinie Mine. The subscription receipts, now trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under “NOU.R.U,” will convert into common shares once specified release conditions are met, notably the completion of a concurrent approximately US$213 million private placement, expected to close around May 15, 2026.

Combined with previously committed US$335 million in senior project debt facilities, the net proceeds from the offering and private placement are expected to fully fund the design, engineering, and construction of the Phase-2 Matawinie Mine and support NMG’s general corporate needs. If the release conditions are not satisfied by July 31, 2026 or certain termination events occur, investors in the subscription receipts will be refunded their purchase price plus accrued income, underscoring a structured risk framework for stakeholders as NMG advances toward a final investment decision and potential construction launch.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOU) stock is a Buy with a C$6.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nouveau Monde Mining stock, see the TSE:NOU Stock Forecast page.

More about Nouveau Monde Mining

Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc. is an integrated graphite producer developing responsible mining and advanced processing operations in Québec, Canada. data.title: Eightco Reveals AI-Focused Treasury and Major Worldcoin Stake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Eightco Holdings ( (ORBS) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 16, 2026, Eightco Holdings detailed its treasury composition and strategic positions ahead of the April 17 World Lift Off event, underscoring its holding of 277 million Worldcoin (WLD) tokens, about 9% of circulating supply and the largest publicly disclosed institutional stake. Senior management and board member Tom Lee will attend the invite-only World ID launch gathering, highlighting Eightco’s alignment with Proof-of-Human technology as bots now make up an estimated majority of global web traffic.

The company reported a treasury that includes $90 million in OpenAI equity, $25 million in Beast Industries equity, 11,068 ETH, its WLD position and $112 million in cash and equivalents, anchoring its exposure to artificial intelligence, digital identity and the creator economy. By concentrating a significant share of its balance sheet in OpenAI, Worldcoin and Beast Industries, Eightco is tying its fortunes to the growth of consumer AI, human verification networks and large-scale creator-led businesses, a strategy that could amplify both upside potential and sensitivity to volatility in digital assets and private-market valuations.

Spark’s Take on ORBS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ORBS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large recent losses and consistently negative cash flow) and bearish technical signals (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation support is limited given losses and no dividend yield, partially offset by positive corporate events and funding/strategy updates.

To see Spark’s full report on ORBS stock, click here.

More about Eightco Holdings

Eightco Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ORBS) is a publicly traded holding company that offers investors single-ticker exposure to three major innovation themes: artificial intelligence through a pre-IPO equity stake in OpenAI, digital identity via its position as the largest public holder of Worldcoin’s WLD token and the Proof-of-Human protocol, and the creator economy through its equity stake in MrBeast’s Beast Industries. Backed by institutional investors including BitMine Immersion, ARK Invest and Payward/Kraken, the company is positioning itself as part of the infrastructure layer for human verification in the emerging agentic AI era.

data.title: MAIA Expands THIO-101 Lung Cancer Trial in U.S.
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. ( (MAIA) ).

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in targeted immuno-oncology therapies, is developing ateganosine (THIO), a first-in-class telomere-targeting agent for telomerase-positive non-small cell lung cancer patients who have exhausted standard checkpoint inhibitor treatments. The company’s focus on later-line NSCLC and its FDA Fast Track designation underscore its ambition to address a large, underserved population with limited therapeutic options.

On April 16, 2026, MAIA activated the first U.S. clinical site, at Summit Medical Group in New Jersey, for its ongoing international Phase 2 THIO-101 expansion trial evaluating ateganosine as a third-line treatment for advanced non-small cell lung cancer. The U.S. expansion, backed by a $2.3 million NIH grant and following 2025 data showing disease control, response, and survival outcomes well above standard benchmarks with an acceptable safety profile, significantly broadens the patient pool and strengthens MAIA’s position in the competitive NSCLC landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (MAIA) stock is a Buy with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. stock, see the MAIA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MAIA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MAIA is a Neutral.

MAIA Biotechnology presents a mixed outlook. The company’s financial performance is weak due to its development-stage status and lack of revenue, contributing to a low financial performance score. However, recent positive trial results and technical indicators showing short-term upward momentum provide a more optimistic view. Valuation remains challenging due to negative earnings, but the potential for significant clinical advancements offers upside potential.

To see Spark’s full report on MAIA stock, click here.

More about MAIA Biotechnology, Inc.

MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. is a Chicago-based clinical-stage biopharmaceutical and immuno-oncology company developing targeted therapies for cancer. Its lead program is ateganosine (THIO), a first-in-class telomere-targeting agent in clinical development for non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), focused on patients with telomerase-positive cancer cells who have progressed beyond current checkpoint inhibitor regimens.

The company aims to commercialize novel mechanisms of action that meaningfully improve and extend the lives of cancer patients. MAIA holds U.S. FDA Fast Track designation for its lead drug in advanced NSCLC, positioning it to potentially benefit from expedited regulatory review pathways in a setting where treatment options remain limited.

Average Trading Volume: 1,093,999

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $86.15M

MiMedx Group ( (MDXG) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, MiMedx initiated a restructuring and cost reduction program designed to prioritize growth areas, streamline operations and materially lower operating expenses, including eliminating the Chief Operating Officer role held by Ricci Whitlow, whose departure was not related to any disagreement with the company. As part of the initiative, CEO Joe Capper’s salary was cut by 20% and other named executives’ pay by 10% through year-end 2026, as the company responds to sluggish recovery in its Wound Care business following a January 1 Medicare reimbursement reduction.

Announced publicly on April 16, 2026, the program is expected to generate approximately $40 million in annualized savings while incurring about $4 million in one-time restructuring charges in the second quarter of 2026. Management framed the move as necessary to protect future profitability, reallocating resources toward its growing Surgical business while adjusting its cost structure to a slower-than-anticipated market rebound, with further details to come alongside first-quarter 2026 results later in April.

data.title: Visium Adopts New Series G Preferred and Remediation Plan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Visium Technologies ( (VISM) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, Visium Technologies’ board approved and filed a new Certificate of Designation for Series G Governing Preferred Stock under Florida law, creating a senior series that ranks pari passu with Series AA Preferred Stock and ahead of Series A, Series B, and all other equity as to dividends, liquidation preference, redemption rights, and distributions. On the same date, the company issued four shares of this Series G stock for nominal consideration to accredited investors who are existing Series AA holders or affiliates, in a private placement exempt from SEC registration rules.

In connection with the new Series G class, the board adopted a Remediation Plan for legacy Series A and B Preferred Stock issued in 2015–2016, addressing long‑expired mandatory conversion dates and documentation and proof‑of‑payment deficiencies. The plan offers qualifying investors a 125‑day window for discounted cash redemption or exchange into new unregistered common stock, while non‑qualifying holders receive no consideration, and the company plans a Florida court action to confirm these steps and now deems the probability of any Series A or B conversion remote for diluted EPS purposes, with no change to prior diluted share disclosures and no dilutive impact from Series G.

More about Visium Technologies

Visium Technologies, Inc. operates as a publicly traded company whose capital structure includes multiple classes of preferred and common stock, reflecting an investor base that spans legacy preferred shareholders and affiliated accredited investors. The company’s governance framework relies on Florida corporate law, and it actively manages its capitalization and shareholder rights through new series designations and remediation plans.

XMAX ( (XWIN) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 13, 2026, XMax Inc. entered into securities purchase agreements with 22 non-U.S. investors to sell 462,500 shares of its common stock in a private placement at $6.705 per share. The transaction, totaling approximately $3.1 million, is being conducted under the Regulation S exemption from registration under the Securities Act of 1933, allowing the company to secure additional equity capital from foreign investors without a public offering.

The private placement expands XMax’s shareholder base internationally and provides fresh funding that can support its corporate activities, potentially strengthening its financial position and flexibility. By relying on an established regulatory exemption for offshore offerings, the company avoids the costs and timing constraints of a registered public sale while still tapping demand from non-U.S. capital providers.

These operational gains and safety milestones underscore Americas’ strategy of aggressively ramping up production capacity and automation at its flagship U.S. and Mexican mines. data.title: Tiziana Life Sciences Highlights Preclinical Long COVID Brain Fog Data for Intranasal Foralumab
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Tiziana Life Sciences ( (TLSA) ).

On April 16, 2026, Tiziana Life Sciences reported positive preclinical data from independent academic collaborators showing that intranasal anti-CD3 antibody treatment reduced neuroinflammation and improved cognition in a mouse model of Long COVID. The bioRxiv study, which evaluated a nasal anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody resembling Tiziana’s foralumab, also found increased regulatory T cells in the brain, restored hippocampal neurogenesis and reversal of “brain fog”-like deficits, reinforcing the rationale for Tiziana’s intranasal foralumab programs and potentially bolstering its positioning in post-viral neuroinflammatory indications.

The work, led by researchers at Yale University and Brigham and Women’s Hospital, used a mild respiratory SARS-CoV-2 mouse model and complementary human data showing reduced circulating Tregs in Long COVID patients with neurological symptoms. Executives said the findings validate the mechanistic foundation for ongoing clinical efforts in multiple sclerosis and other neurodegenerative diseases, and may support expansion into Long COVID “brain fog,” adding momentum to Tiziana’s broader intranasal immunotherapy platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (TLSA) stock is a Buy with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tiziana Life Sciences stock, see the TLSA Stock Forecast page.

More about Tiziana Life Sciences

Tiziana Life Sciences is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on immunotherapy delivered through alternative routes, particularly intranasal administration. Its lead asset, intranasal foralumab, a fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, targets neuroinflammatory and neurodegenerative diseases, including non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis, MSA, Alzheimer’s disease and ALS.
